inputs.value: masterpiece, best quality, score_7, safe, anime, 1girl, zhu yuan,zenless zone zero
worst quality, low quality, score_1, score_2, score_3, blurry, jpeg artifacts, sepia

**Model:** Anima (anima_baseV10.safetensors). Trained on Danbooru tags, natural language captions, and tag+caption combinations.

**Tag format:** Use lowercase with spaces (not underscores). Score tags are the only tags using underscores.

**Recommended positive prefix:** masterpiece, best quality, score_7, safe, 
**Recommended negative:** worst quality, low quality, score_1, score_2, score_3, artist name

**Tag order:** [quality/meta/year/safety tags] [1girl/1boy/etc] [character] [series] [artist] [general tags]

**Quality tags (use either or both):** masterpiece, best quality, good quality, normal quality, low quality, worst quality — and/or — score_9 through score_1.

**Time period:** year 2025, year 2024, ..., newest, recent, mid, early, old
**Meta:** highres, absurdres, anime screenshot, jpeg artifacts, official art
**Safety:** safe, sensitive, nsfw, explicit

**Artists:** Prefix with @ (e.g. @big chungus). Required — effect is weak without @.

**Prompt weighting** works but needs higher weight than typical SDXL (e.g. (chibi:2)).

**Full example:** year 2025, newest, normal quality, score_5, highres, safe, 1girl, oomuro sakurako, yuru yuri, @nnn yryr, smile, brown hair, hat, solo, long hair, open mouth, looking at viewer, white background, simple background

**Image With Text:** Anima is able to generate image with decent qualitied text with prompts like 'holding sign above head with red painted text "Hello!"'
